ddls:
CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "ville_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the village or city where the household is located */,
  "total_members" INTEGER /* Total number of members in the household */,
  "number_children" INTEGER /* Number of children in the household */,
  "marital_status" INTEGER /* Marital status of the household head (1 for married, 0 for unmarried) */,
  "depressed" INTEGER /* Indicator of depression in the household (1 for depressed, 0 for not depressed) */,
  "housing_type" TEXT /* Type of housing (e.g., ownership, rental, shared) */,
  "income_level" REAL /* Average monthly income level of the household */,
  "expenditure_level" REAL /* Average monthly expenditure level of the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_ville_id FOREIGN KEY ("ville_id") REFERENCES villages ("ville_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "villages" (
  "ville_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each village or city */,
  "ville_name" TEXT /* Name of the village or city */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state where the village or city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the village or city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the village or city in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the village or city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the village or city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ville_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household member */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household the member belongs to */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the household member */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the household member */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the household member (1 for male, 0 for female) */,
  "education_level" INTEGER /* Education level of the household member */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the household member */,
  "relationship_to_head" TEXT /* Relationship of the member to the household head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_members_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_sources" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income source */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household the income source belongs to */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of income source (e.g., salary, farm, business) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of income received */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the income source */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of income (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_sources_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household the expense belongs to */,
  "expense_type" TEXT /* Type of expense (e.g., living, other) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of expense */,
  "expense_description" TEXT /* Description of the expense */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of expense (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of expense (e.g., food, transportation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household the asset belongs to */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., durable, non-durable, savings) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Value of the asset */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date of acquisition */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the asset (e.g., new, used) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household the investment belongs to */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment (e.g., lasting, non-lasting) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the investment */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date of the investment */,
  "return_amount" REAL /* Return amount from the investment */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the investment (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mental_health" (
  "mental_health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mental health indicator */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household the indicator belongs to */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of mental health indicator (e.g., depression) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the indicator (1 for positive, 0 for negative) */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the mental health assessment */,
  "assessment_result" TEXT /* Result of the mental health assessment (e.g., healthy, unhealthy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mental_health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mental_health_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household the survey was conducted for */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was conducted */,
  "surveyor_name" TEXT /* Name of the surveyor */,
  "surveyor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the surveyor */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey (e.g., initial, follow-up) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_surveyor_id FOREIGN KEY ("surveyor_id") REFERENCES surveyors ("surveyor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveyors" (
  "surveyor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each surveyor */,
  "surveyor_name" TEXT /* Name of the surveyor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the surveyor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the surveyor */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the surveyor operates in */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification of the surveyor (e.g., trained, certified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("surveyor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_data" (
  "survey_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey data entry */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the data belongs to */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field in the survey */,
  "field_value" TEXT /* Value of the field in the survey */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the field (e.g., numeric, text) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_data_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the survey data */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey that was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
